untranslatable_reason: Martingale position sizing logic with dynamic contract cap cannot be expressed in indicator conditions. This requires position management rules outside the scope of entry/exit signal logic. The MA trendline direction is translatable, but the contract sizing multiplier and cap thresholds require algorithmic position sizing implementation separate from signal generation.

Martingale sizing (contracts varying from 1 to cap) and specific thresholds for moving_average_period and martingale_contract_cap are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in original and cannot be inferred from the provided excerpt.
